description: Few-shot examples for Supervisor Agent - Routing Decisions

metadata.source: Extracted from successful RISC-V porting sessions

routing_principles: Use heuristic routing for cost optimization when API calls > 8
Always check escalation conditions before routing
Route to SCOUT when build plan is missing or invalid
Route to BUILDER when plan exists and status is PENDING
Route to FIXER when build has failed with fixable error
Route to ESCALATE for fundamental blockers or max attempts
escalation_conditions: Stuck in error loop (same error 3+ times)

examples.name: Initial State - No Plan

expected_output.reason: No task plan exists - need strategic planning first

examples.reasoning: Fresh start requires planning phase before any other action

examples.name: Plan Exists, No Build Plan

expected_output.reason: Task plan exists but build plan is missing

examples.reasoning: After planning, Scout needs to create detailed build plan

examples.name: Build Plan Ready - Execute

expected_output.reason: Build plan ready, proceeding with execution

examples.reasoning: When plan exists and no errors, proceed to build

examples.name: Build Failed - Fixable Error

expected_output.reason: Missing tools error - need to update build plan

examples.reasoning: MISSING_TOOLS is better handled by Scout updating the plan than Fixer patching

examples.name: Build Failed - Compilation Error

expected_output.reason: Compilation error - Fixer can analyze and patch

examples.reasoning: Compilation errors can often be fixed with patches

examples.name: Build Success
examples.reasoning: Successful build means we can finish and generate documentation

examples.name: Error Loop Detection

expected_output.reason: Stuck in error loop with same category - requires human intervention

examples.reasoning: When the same error persists despite fix attempts, escalate to human

examples.name: Max Attempts Reached
examples.reasoning: Safety limit to prevent infinite loops

examples.name: Cost Optimization Trigger

expected_output.reason: Cost optimization heuristic - using recommendation system

examples.reasoning: When API calls exceed 8 or cost > $0.08, use heuristic routing instead of LLM

examples.name: Architecture Impossible

expected_output.reason: Fundamental blocker: code cannot be ported to RISC-V

examples.reasoning: Some architecture-specific code (x86 assembly without fallback) cannot be ported
